data.title: Jane Street Group Achieves Record $39.6 Billion Trading Revenue
data.description: Jane Street Group reported a trading revenue of $39.6 billion last year, setting a record on Wall Street. According to Odaily, the company achieved $15.5 billion in revenue during the fourth quarter alone. Despite having only 3,500 employees, Jane Street's annual trading revenue surpassed that of global investment banks like JPMorgan Chase, exceeding its closest competitor by 11%.

data.title: Apple's Leadership Transition: John Ternus to Become CEO in 2026
data.description: Wedbush Securities has set a $350 price target for Apple following the announcement by Tim Cook that John Ternus will assume the role of CEO on September 1, 2026. According to NS3.AI, Tim Cook will transition to the position of Executive Chairman, marking a significant shift in Apple's leadership structure.

data.title: The Nasdaq 100 index extended its gains to 1.5%.
data.description: According to Gate data, the Nasdaq 100 index extended its gains to 1.5%.

data.title: Jane Street's trading revenue reached $39.6 billion last year, surpassing that of major Wall Street banks.
data.description: Jane Street Group set a Wall Street record with $39.6 billion in trading revenue last year. The company's revenue reached $15.5 billion in the fourth quarter alone. With only 3,500 employees, Jane Street's annual trading revenue surpassed that of global investment banks like JPMorgan Chase, exceeding its closest competitor, JPMorgan Chase, by 11%.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Tesla's Strategic Shift Towards AI-Powered Innovations
data.description:
Tesla CEO Elon Musk is steering the company towards a future dominated by AI-driven technologies, focusing on robotaxis and humanoid robots. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Musk's vision for Tesla to transition from solely an electric vehicle manufacturer to a leader in artificial intelligence applications. This strategic pivot aims to leverage AI to enhance transportation and automation, potentially revolutionizing industries beyond automotive.

Musk's ambitious plans include the development of autonomous vehicles capable of operating as robotaxis, which could significantly impact urban mobility and reduce reliance on human drivers. Additionally, Tesla is investing in humanoid robots designed to perform tasks traditionally handled by humans, showcasing the company's commitment to advancing AI capabilities.

The move aligns with Musk's broader vision of integrating AI into everyday life, positioning Tesla at the forefront of technological innovation. As the company continues to invest in AI research and development, it faces challenges in ensuring safety, reliability, and regulatory compliance for these emerging technologies.

Tesla's shift towards AI-powered solutions reflects a growing trend among tech companies to explore the potential of artificial intelligence in transforming industries and enhancing human capabilities. The success of these initiatives could redefine Tesla's role in the tech landscape, emphasizing its commitment to pioneering advancements in AI.

data.title: The value of the US government's holdings in Intel has surged by 300%.
data.description: The value of the U.S. government's stake in chipmaker Intel (INTC.O) surged 300% to approximately $36 billion after the company's financial outlook indicated a sales recovery. This represents a paper return of nearly $27 billion since Intel and the U.S. government announced the investment last August. The company's CEO won over the White House through a charm offensive and repaired his relationship with President Trump, ultimately securing this extraordinary investment. (Jinshi)

data.title: Swiss regulators say Mythos poses a financial risk.
data.description: The Swiss Financial Market Supervisory Authority (FINMA) stated that enabling banks to quickly and easily use Anthropic's artificial intelligence tool, Mythos, poses a serious risk to the country's financial system. A spokesperson for the agency said, "The uncontrolled and readily available nature of AI models like Mythos is considered a systemic risk. In such cases, almost all existing software systems could be simultaneously vulnerable to a large number of previously unknown zero-day vulnerabilities that could be exploited immediately, and through artificial intelligence." (Jinshi)

data.title: AI TRENDS | FINMA Warns of Systemic Risks from Anthropic's AI Tool Mythos
data.description: On April 24, FINMA, the Swiss Financial Market Supervisory Authority, expressed concerns over the rapid and convenient use of Anthropic's AI tool, Mythos, within the country's financial system. According to Jin10, a spokesperson from FINMA stated that AI models like Mythos, which are uncontrolled and readily accessible, pose a systemic risk. The spokesperson highlighted that in such scenarios, nearly all existing software systems could simultaneously be affected by numerous previously unknown zero-day vulnerabilities. These vulnerabilities would be immediately exploited through AI.

data.title: Nvidia (NVDA.O) shares extended gains to 5% during trading.
data.description: According to Gate data, Nvidia (NVDA.O) shares rose as much as 5% during the session.

data.title: Aurelion Holds Significant Tether Gold Reserves
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Aurelion has announced its holdings of 33,318 Tether Gold (XAUT), valued at approximately $157 million as of April 23. According to NS3.AI, the company has staked 10,000 XAUT as yield-generating collateral, while the remaining 23,318 XAUT remains unstaked.

data.title: Nakamoto Launches Bitcoin Derivatives Program
data.description: Nakamoto, a Nasdaq-listed company, has announced the initiation of a Bitcoin derivatives program. According to Foresight News, the company plans to place a portion of its Bitcoin holdings in Kraken's compliant custody solution as collateral for its derivatives strategy. Bitwise will manage these assets in a separately managed account (SMA), employing covered call and call spread strategies to generate consistent premium income. Additionally, protective put and put spread strategies will be used to hedge against market value fluctuations due to potential declines in Bitcoin prices.

data.title: Microsoft's Share Price Rises Ahead of Earnings Report Amid Investor Focus on Azure and AI
data.description: Microsoft shares have increased approximately 19% from their March lows, reaching around $415 as the company approaches its April 29 earnings report. According to NS3.AI, this follows a 34% decline from the 52-week high. Investors are keenly observing whether growth in Azure, spending on AI infrastructure, and exposure to OpenAI's backlog can sustain this recovery.

data.title: Kevin Warsh's Confirmation as Federal Reserve Chair Gains Momentum
data.description: The probability of Kevin Warsh being confirmed as the Federal Reserve Chair by May 15 has surged from 27% to 85%, according to Odaily. This increase is attributed to the U.S. Department of Justice's expected decision to drop the criminal investigation against current Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. Previously, Thom Tillis, a member of the Senate Banking Committee, stated he would block Warsh's nomination from reaching a full Senate vote if U.S. President Donald Trump did not withdraw the investigation against Powell. With the anticipated withdrawal of the investigation, the market now expects Warsh to be confirmed by the Senate before Powell's term ends on May 15.

data.title: JPX Considers Rule Change for Index Inclusion of Cryptoasset Companies
data.description: JPX Market Innovation & Research is evaluating a proposed rule that would delay the inclusion of companies primarily holding cryptoassets in TOPIX and other indices subject to periodic review. According to NS3.AI, the proposal has been criticized for being vague, asset-specific, and open-ended. The public comment period for this proposal is set to close on May 7, 2026.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Stock Indices Show Mixed Performance
data.description: U.S. stock indices exhibited varied movements recently, with the Nasdaq Composite rising over 1%, the S&P 500 increasing by 0.4%, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average declining by 0.3%. According to Jin10, these fluctuations reflect differing investor sentiments across the major indices.

data.title: Energy Recovery Delayed by Persian Gulf Closure
data.description: The prolonged closure of the Persian Gulf is expected to significantly delay the recovery of energy flows, potentially taking months or even years. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting the impact of this closure on global energy markets. The disruption has raised concerns among industry experts about the long-term effects on supply chains and energy prices. As the situation unfolds, stakeholders are closely monitoring developments to assess the potential implications for the global economy.

data.title: The White House is confident the Senate will quickly confirm Kevin Warsh as the next Federal Reserve Chairman.
data.description: The White House is confident that the Senate will quickly confirm Kevin Warsh as the next Federal Reserve Chairman. (Jinshi)

data.title: On Polymarket, the probability that "Wash will be confirmed as the Federal Reserve Chairman before May 15" rose to 85%, a short-term increase of 211%.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that the probability of "Wash being confirmed as Federal Reserve Chairman before May 15th" on Polymarket has risen from 27% to 85%, a short-term increase of 211%. This is due to the U.S. Department of Justice's expected withdrawal of its criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chairman Powell. Previously, Senator Thom Tillis, a member of the Banking Committee, stated that if Trump did not withdraw the criminal investigation against Powell, he would block Wash's nomination to the full Senate. With the current news of the Justice Department withdrawing its criminal investigation against Powell, the market expects Wash to have a very high probability of being confirmed by the Senate as Federal Reserve Chairman before Powell's term expires (May 15th). Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before they are priced in.

data.title: The Ethereum Foundation sold 10,000 ETH to Bitmine today.
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation announced on the X platform that it completed the sale of 10,000 ETH today via OTC, at an average price of $2,387. The counterparty in this OTC transaction was Bitmine.

data.title: AI Demand Boosts X-Energy's Valuation Above $9 Billion Ahead of Public Debut
data.description: Nuclear-energy company X-Energy is poised to go public on Friday with a valuation exceeding $9 billion, driven by the increasing demand for electricity fueled by advancements in artificial intelligence. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that the company's entry into the public market highlights the growing interest in alternative energy sources as AI technologies continue to expand. The heightened need for reliable and sustainable power solutions is pushing companies like X-Energy to the forefront, as they seek to capitalize on the evolving energy landscape. This move underscores the intersection of technology and energy sectors, as AI's rapid growth necessitates innovative approaches to meet its substantial energy requirements.
